title: triticum juncellum
intro: Triticum juncellum, also known as jointed wheat grass or joint wheat, is a perennial grass species belonging to the wheat family (Poaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. The health benefits of Triticum juncellum include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and even help reduce stress and anxiety levels. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement to reap its medicinal benefits.
